channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: AI Agent Permission Control
item.description: SDKs and frameworks that govern what autonomous AI agents can access and do, using container isolation and vault proxies for security

item.title: AI Red Teaming Platforms
item.description: Full-stack security platforms that proactively test AI ecosystems for infrastructure vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and agent workflow exploits

item.title: Multi Agent Context Scoping
item.description: The discipline of deciding what information each agent in a multi-agent system should see, controlling context boundaries to prevent overload, leakage, and irrelevant noise.

item.title: Niche SaaS Positioning
item.description: The strategy of targeting narrow verticals with highly specific software products, using focus as a competitive advantage against broad-market noise.

item.title: Niche Vertical SaaS Pattern
item.description: A recurring pattern of successful micro-SaaS products built around narrow professional verticals — from expert witness billing to hemodialysis safety — where specificity itself is the product.

item.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.11 — Security Depth, Multimodal Memory, and ACP Session Continuity
item.description: A review of the 2026.3.11 release — notable for layered security hardening across privilege separation, sandbox integrity, and auth boundaries, plus multimodal memory indexing and ACP session resumption.

item.title: Production Readiness Gap
item.description: The underestimated distance between a working AI agent demo and a production-ready system that meets real business requirements for security, reliability, and compliance.

item.title: Pulse Signal Monitoring System
item.description: An automated scanner that polls Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, and other sources on regular intervals to surface SaaS opportunities, pain points, and competitor launches before they become obvious.

item.title: Reddit Lead Generation
item.description: Using Reddit as a distribution channel to find and engage potential customers organically, as an alternative to cold outreach.

item.title: SaaS Market Noise Problem
item.description: AI has made SaaS development faster but simultaneously flooded the market, making discovery and differentiation harder for all builders.
